infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to show nearby cafes and help you find your way.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses your camera so you can take photos for your cafe reviews.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library so you can add photos to your cafe reviews.
